c911ea18cb53955762bfd0f097d98402.summary: JWT Secret hardcodé dans le code source
c911ea18cb53955762bfd0f097d98402.impact: Un secret JWT hardcodé pourrait exposer les données sensibles et la sécurité de l'application.
c911ea18cb53955762bfd0f097d98402.root_cause: Le développeur a hardcodé le secret JWT directement dans le code source sans utiliser process.env.JWT_SECRET
c911ea18cb53955762bfd0f097d98402.priority_note: Immédiat, car le secret JWT hardcodé pourrait exposer les données sensibles et la sécurité de l'application.

5aaaac15a8fb362afe8de545a5781abc.summary: A high severity vulnerability in the moment package of webpack version 1.0.0 allows directory traversal.
5aaaac15a8fb362afe8de545a5781abc.impact: The impact is High as it could lead to unauthorized access and data manipulation, potentially leading to system compromise or loss of sensitive information.
5aaaac15a8fb362afe8de545a5781abc.root_cause: A flaw was found in the moment package version 2.29.1 which allows directory traversal when parsing certain user-supplied input.

bc7e803588cbe5a82f5686d82af4136a.title: Path Traversal Vulnerability Fix
recommendations: Ensure that the path traversal vulnerabilities are identified and fixed.
Use 'path.basename()' to prevent path traversals in file paths.
bc7e803588cbe5a82f5686d82af4136a.verification: Run a security scanner and look for any indicators of path traversal vulnerabilities.
bc7e803588cbe5a82f5686d82af4136a.prevention: Implement input validation to prevent the usage of '..' in file paths.

2730842c470e086d9600ba60ffffb8ae.title: Path Traversal Vulnerability Fix
recommendations: Ensure that all file paths are sanitized and validated before being used.
Use the path.basename() function to prevent traversing outside of intended directory structure.
2730842c470e086d9600ba60ffffb8ae.verification: Test by attempting to access files or directories that are not supposed to be accessible.
2730842c470e086d9600ba60ffffb8ae.prevention: Implement input validation and sanitization techniques, such as using path.basename() function.

710c9c839629b4c5178b45a4686a5b01.title: No Console Log
710c9c839629b4c5178b45a4686a5b01.description: Evitez console.log en production. Utilisez logger.info()
recommendations: Supprimez tous les appels à console.log dans le code.
Utilisez un logger approprié pour la journalisation des informations.
Testez régulièrement votre application pour s'assurer que la journalisation fonctionne correctement.
710c9c839629b4c5178b45a4686a5b01.verification: Examinez le code source de l'application pour voir si des appels à console.log sont encore présents.
710c9c839629b4c5178b45a4686a5b01.prevention: Utilisez un logger approprié et configurez-le correctement pour éviter la journalisation non désirée.

bbd13ad5ee3be7ae2e4da420c1028a4d.title: No Console Log
recommendations: Replace all console.log statements with logger.info() calls.
Ensure that the logger is configured correctly and logs are being sent to a logging service.
bbd13ad5ee3be7ae2e4da420c1028a4d.verification: Run tests or code reviews to ensure that console.log statements have been removed.
bbd13ad5ee3be7ae2e4da420c1028a4d.prevention: Use a logging library like winston, bunyan etc., which provides more control and flexibility over log levels.

d47743c4e6e6fb072ff74a051721eecf.summary: The Juice-Shop application is using an outdated version of the jws package, which may have vulnerabilities in its cryptographic signature verification.
d47743c4e6e6fb072ff74a051721eecf.impact: This could lead to unauthorized access or manipulation of data due to improper verification of cryptographic signatures. The impact on the system's availability and integrity is high.
d47743c4e6e6fb072ff74a051721eecf.root_cause: The vulnerable version of jws package used in Juice-Shop application may have vulnerabilities that can be exploited by malicious actors.

29228ecfca490836acfcab7a1321dc0f.title: Fix for Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature
recommendations: Upgrade the vulnerable package 'jws' to a version that is not affected by this vulnerability.
Ensure all dependencies are also updated to their latest versions.
29228ecfca490836acfcab7a1321dc0f.verification: Run tests or check the version of 'jws' in use.
29228ecfca490836acfcab7a1321dc0f.prevention: Immediately upgrade to a patched version as soon as possible.

e6ce62a635e2e5bb0272c52654b0ecb5.title: generic.html-templates.security.unquoted-attribute-var
e6ce62a635e2e5bb0272c52654b0ecb5.description: Result message: Detected a unquoted template variable as an attribute. If unquoted, a malicious actor could inject custom JavaScript handlers. To fix this, add quotes around the template expression.

030e5a5ce698e4f019a51974cfe65ded.title: Fix for Unquoted Attribute Variable in HTML Templates
recommendations: Ensure that all unquoted template variables are enclosed within quotes.
Review the code to ensure there are no missing or extra quotation marks.
Test thoroughly after making changes to confirm they resolve the issue.
030e5a5ce698e4f019a51974cfe65ded.verification: Run a static code analysis tool that identifies unquoted template variables and ensure they are enclosed within quotes.
030e5a5ce698e4f019a51974cfe65ded.prevention: Use Angular's built-in security features to prevent injection of custom JavaScript handlers.

649681ce21682f3a7ac89da58c62b29e.title: generic.html-templates.security.unquoted-attribute-var
649681ce21682f3a7ac89da58c62b29e.description: Result message: Detected a unquoted template variable as an attribute. If unquoted, a malicious actor could inject custom JavaScript handlers. To fix this, add quotes around the template expression.

7f442e4757566ef6b3e71eaed42c2729.title: XSS-Reflected-Basic
7f442e4757566ef6b3e71eaed42c2729.description: **Result message:** XSS REFLECHI  - Escape variables with escapeHtml()

af61479065b9c3868cdf6c68302e545b.title: XSS Reflected Basic
recommendations: Escape variables using escapeHtml() function
af61479065b9c3868cdf6c68302e545b.verification: Test the application by submitting a payload and checking if it is reflected back as expected.
af61479065b9c3868cdf6c68302e545b.prevention: Use libraries that automatically escape variables, or manually ensure all user input is escaped.

06d9b2e7f9481e74e9732c956184aba3.summary: Unquoted template variable as an attribute.
06d9b2e7f9481e74e9732c956184aba3.impact: If unquoted, a malicious actor could inject custom JavaScript handlers which can lead to Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attacks.
06d9b2e7f9481e74e9732c956184aba3.root_cause: The vulnerability arises from the way Angular templates handle variables without proper quoting.
06d9b2e7f9481e74e9732c956184aba3.priority_note: Immediate — This vulnerability can lead to potential XSS attacks.

053524d870afb82b282b41b9ae60a8b4.title: Unquoted Template Variable Attribute Fix
recommendations: Ensure all template expressions are quoted.
Review and update any scripts or event handlers that may be using the unquoted variable.
053524d870afb82b282b41b9ae60a8b4.verification: Run a security scanner to confirm all template expressions are quoted.
053524d870afb82b282b41b9ae60a8b4.prevention: Always quote unquoted template variables and attributes.

24465b34550e22d5aabe7a3cc6f0fcb5.impact: An attacker can execute untrusted code within the sandbox without restrictions.
24465b34550e22d5aabe7a3cc6f0fcb5.root_cause: The vulnerable version of vm2 allows execution of arbitrary JavaScript code.
24465b34550e22d5aabe7a3cc6f0fcb5.priority_note: Immediate — this vulnerability is exploitable and can lead to system compromise.

67ef72088c73a1a25f3e4331d545e557.title: VM2 Sandbox Bypass Fix
recommendations: Upgrade vm2 to a version greater than 3.9.17.
Review all code that uses vm2 for any untrusted code execution.
Ensure all user inputs are properly sanitized and validated.
67ef72088c73a1a25f3e4331d545e557.verification: Run tests to confirm vm2 is no longer vulnerable.
67ef72088c73a1a25f3e4331d545e557.prevention: Always use a version of vm2 that has been patched.

aeb1baf4949e613695f9d9b35f608508.summary: SQL injection in login form allows bypassing authentication.
aeb1baf4949e613695f9d9b35f608508.impact: An attacker can log in as any user without a password. All user data in the database is exposed.
aeb1baf4949e613695f9d9b35f608508.root_cause: User input is concatenated directly into SQL queries without sanitization.
aeb1baf4949e613695f9d9b35f608508.priority_note: Immediate — this vulnerability is trivially exploitable and exposes all user accounts.

cdb03ce19831d4b6865e3f4903dbd176.summary: Sequelize statement is vulnerable to SQL injection due to uncontrolled user input.
cdb03ce19831d4b6865e3f4903dbd176.impact: An attacker can execute arbitrary SQL commands leading to data theft or manipulation of sensitive information in the database.
cdb03ce19831d4b6865e3f4903dbd176.root_cause: User input is directly concatenated into SQL queries without sanitization.
cdb03ce19831d4b6865e3f4903dbd176.priority_note: Immediate — this vulnerability can be exploited to manipulate the database.
